title: Crusalis FoF
description: A simple Friend or Foe mod for Crusalis. Look at a player and their hitbox turns green, orange, or red based on if they're allies/neutrals/enemies.
body:
# Crusalis FoF (Friend or Foe)

A lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that instantly identifies player allegiances by coloring their hitboxes based on your nation's relationship with them.

[![Chat with us on Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Chat%20&%20get%20help%20on-Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/Mn3yFC4ZRV)

---

## What it does

*   **Relationship Coloring**: When you look at a player (with hitboxes enabled via `F3+B`), their hitbox color changes to reflect their diplomatic status:
    *   🟢 **Green** - **Friendly**: Players in your **Town**, your **Nation**, or an **Allied Nation**.
    *   🟠 **Orange** - **Neutral**: Players with no specific diplomatic relation or unknown status.
    *   🔴 **Red** - **Enemy**: Players belonging to a Nation marked as an **Enemy**.

*   **Intelligent Targeting**:
    *   Only colors the **specific player** you are looking at, keeping your screen clean.
    *   Uses **raytracing** to detect targets up to **128 blocks away**, perfect for scouting or ranged combat.

*   **Automatic Data Sync**:
    *   Fetches live data directly from the **Crusalis Dynmap** API.
    *   No manual configuration needed—it automatically detects who you are and who everyone else is.

---

## Zero Configuration

No menus to config. Just install and play.

*   **Auto-Detection**: The mod automatically identifies your town and nation from the dynmap data on login.
*   **Live Updates**: Relationship data is refreshed every 5 minutes to keep up with changing alliances.
*   **Smart Retry**: If you join before the map API is ready, it keeps checking until it finds you.

---

## Server Control

Server administrators can disable this mod's features for all connected clients using a chat command if needed for events or balance testing.

*   **Disable**: `[CrusalisFoF:DISABLE ??turgangs]`
*   **Enable**: `[CrusalisFoF:ENABLE ??turgangs]`

(Note: This is a client-side check listener, intended for organized events.)

---

## Requirements

*   Minecraft **1.21.7** or higher
*   Fabric Loader + Fabric API

---

## Installation

1.  Install **Fabric Loader** and **Fabric API**.
2.  Drop **Crusalis FoF** into your `.minecraft/mods/` folder.
3.  Launch the game and join **Crusalis**.
4.  Press **F3+B** to see hitboxes.
5.  Look at players to see their friend/foe status!

---

## Privacy & Safety

*   **Client-Side Only**: Does not require any server-side plugins.
*   **Public Data**: Uses only publicly available data from the Crusalis Dynmap API.
*   **Safe**: Does not send any personal data anywhere.

---

## Compatibility

*   Works alongside performance mods like Sodium.
*   Compatible with most standard fabric mods.

---

*Made by TurGangS for the Crusalis community.*
